C:\cmake-3.25.1-windows-x86_64\cmake-3.25.1-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\MioProgetto.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\MioProgetto.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\MioProgetto.dir\objects1
C:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\MioProgetto.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o MioProgetto.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libMioProgetto.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\MioProgetto.dir\linkLibs.rsp
